auto_fix.status: 3 FIXES APPLIED: INSIGHTS_REINVERSION_MARK_FIX (conf=82%), SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2 graduated (conf=76%), CONF_60_70_COLLISION_AUDIT flagged (conf=72% - below threshold, gate=0%).

fixes_detail.description: Marked evening (65% WR, conf=0.85) and afternoon (64% WR, conf=0.85) insights as invalidated in insights.json. Both claimed by pre-dedup sample — post-dedup reality is evening=33% WR, afternoon=27% WR.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: Prevents meta_learning from re-proposing inverted ideas (2238f358/920b3e13) in next cycle. Without this fix, EVENING_session_boost would re-escalate from 20%->80% within 2-3 cycles.

fixes_detail.description: Graduated idea_98fac4ad to SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2. Gate=20% A/B probe. -5pt confidence penalty when >65% of recent 20 trades are same direction. Evidence: 74% LONG, LONG WR=30% vs SHORT=77% (n=50, conf=0.75).
fixes_detail.expected_impact: 20% of same-side over-loaded signals redirected to neutral. If LONG WR=30% persists: ~$0.70/affected trade EV improvement.

new_findings_this_run.detail: After INSIGHTS_DEDUP_PRUNING (2026-05-18) reduced 108->19 insights, two inverted time-of-day claims survived: evening 65% WR (conf=0.85, n=27) and afternoon 64% WR (conf=0.85, n=27). These are the same sample that previously drove EVENING_session_boost to 80% gate. The meta_learning ideas engine would re-detect these as high-confidence edges and re-propose boost rules. Additionally, the morning weakness insight (14% WR, conf=0.675) survived but is below the conflicting morning edge (71% WR, conf=0.73) — morning is safe. The evening/afternoon inversions are the risk.
new_findings_this_run.action: RESOLVED THIS RUN: both insights marked invalidated=True in insights.json.

new_findings_this_run.detail: 6 rules all target 60-70% confidence range: confidence_60_70_sweet_spot(20%), confidence_60_70_ROUTING_FIX(100%), CONF_60_70_floor_raise(80%), CONF_60_70_all_block(100%), CONF_60_70_rollback_probe(20%), CONF_CALIBRATION_INVERSION_AUDIT(0%). Two 100% gates (ROUTING_FIX + all_block) + one 80% gate + two 20% probes. Net execution behavior is undefined. Rule 2 (ROUTING_FIX) was added to SUSPEND rule 1 (sweet_spot) — but instead of retiring rule 1, a new 100% rule was stacked. This is a rule accumulation anti-pattern.
new_findings_this_run.action: FLAGGED for human review as CONF_60_70_COLLISION_AUDIT (gate=0%). Recommend: consolidate to CONF_60_70_all_block + CONF_60_70_rollback_probe (2 rules). Retire the other 4.

new_findings_this_run.detail: insight: '74% of trades are LONG but LONG WR is 30% vs 77% for the other side' (conf=0.75, n=50). Plus: HYPE_LONG hard_block (23% WR) and SOL_LONG hard_block (24% WR) corroborate directional imbalance. idea_98fac4ad (SIDE_BALANCE_ENFORCEMENT) had inferred conf=0.72 in prior analysis — but the source insight is conf=0.75, which meets the graduation threshold.
new_findings_this_run.action: RESOLVED THIS RUN: SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2 graduated to gate=20% probe.
